zh: 如果明天天气好，我们就去野餐。
en: If the weather is nice tomorrow, we will go on a picnic.

zh: 如果你努力学习，你就会通过考试。
en: If you study hard, you will pass the exam.

zh: 如果她早点出发，她就不会迟到。
en: If she leaves early, she will not be late.

zh: 如果你需要帮助，请告诉我。
en: If you need help, please tell me.

zh: 如果他来了，我们就开始。
en: If he comes, we will start.

zh: 如果你不吃早饭，你会饿的。
en: If you do not eat breakfast, you will be hungry.

zh: 如果我们不快点，我们就会错过公共汽车。
en: If we do not hurry, we will miss the bus.

zh: 如果你锻炼，你会更健康。
en: If you exercise, you will be healthier.

zh: 如果她练习，她会弹得更好。
en: If she practices, she will play better.

zh: 如果你有问题，你可以问老师。
en: If you have questions, you can ask the teacher.

zh: 如果我有翅膀，我就能飞翔。
en: If I had wings, I could fly.

zh: 如果她更努力学习，她就会通过考试。
en: If she studied harder, she would pass the exam.

zh: 如果我是你，我就不会那样做。
en: If I were you, I would not do that.

zh: 如果他有更多时间，他就会帮助我们。
en: If he had more time, he would help us.

zh: 如果我住在海边，我每天都会去游泳。
en: If I lived by the sea, I would swim every day.

zh: 如果我有足够的钱，我就会买那辆车。
en: If I had enough money, I would buy that car.

zh: 如果天气好，我们就会去爬山。
en: If the weather were fine, we would go hiking.

zh: 如果她会说中文，她就能和他们交流。
en: If she could speak Chinese, she would be able to communicate with them.

zh: 如果我们早点出发，我们就不会迟到了。
en: If we left earlier, we would not be late.

zh: 如果他不那么懒，他就会成功。
en: If he were not so lazy, he would succeed.

zh: 除非你努力，否则你不会成功。
en: Unless you work hard, you will not succeed.

zh: 除非她道歉，否则我不会原谅她。
en: Unless she apologizes, I will not forgive her.

zh: 只要你尽力，你就会成功。
en: As long as you try your best, you will succeed.

zh: 只要你需要，我就会帮助你。
en: As long as you need me, I will help you.

zh: 万一下雨，我们就在室内举行活动。
en: In case it rains, we will hold the event indoors.

zh: 如果你早点告诉我，我就能帮你了。
en: If you had told me earlier, I could have helped you.

zh: 如果他当时更小心，就不会发生事故了。
en: If he had been more careful, the accident would not have happened.

zh: 如果我们那时带了雨伞，就不会淋湿了。
en: If we had brought an umbrella, we would not have got wet.

zh: 如果她当时接受了那份工作，她现在会更成功。
en: If she had accepted that job, she would be more successful now.

zh: 如果他那时听了我的建议，就不会有这些麻烦了。
en: If he had taken my advice, he would not have had these troubles.
